column1: Target Domain   Target Variable      Variable Label                       Type      Source Data    Source Variable           Mapping Rule
ADSL            STUDYID              Study Identifier                     Char      sdtm.dm        STUDYID                   Copy directly from DM.
ADSL            USUBJID              Unique Subject Identifier            Char      sdtm.dm        USUBJID                   Copy directly from DM.
ADSL            SUBJID               Subject Identifier for the Study     Char      sdtm.dm        SUBJID                    Copy directly from DM.

ADSL            AGE                  Age                                  Num       sdtm.dm        BRTHDTC                   "Extract year from BRTHDTC and calculate age using the INTCK function relative to a study reference date of '2026-01-01'."
ADSL            AGEGR1               Pooled Age Group 1                   Char      ADSL           AGE                       "If AGE < 18 then '<18'
ADSL            SEX                  Sex                                  Char      sdtm.dm        SEX                       Copy directly from DM.
ADSL            RACE                 Race                                 Char      sdtm.dm        RACE                      Copy directly from DM.

ADSL            TRT01P               Planned Treatment for Period 01      Char      ADSL           SUBJID                    "Simulate randomization: If the first character of SUBJID is between '0' and '7', set to 'Placebo'. Otherwise, set to 'Study Drug'."
ADSL            TRT01PN              Planned Treatment for Period 01 (N)  Num       ADSL           TRT01P                    "If TRT01P='Placebo' then 1
ADSL            SAFFL                Safety Population Flag               Char      N/A            N/A                       Set to 'Y' for all subjects to simulate 100% safety participation.
ADSL            ITTFL                Intent-To-Treat Population Flag      Char      N/A            N/A                       Set to 'Y' for all subjects.
